description: An empty field list `struct point [ ]` reports ol-bad-token at the closing bracket (grammar.md's `field-list ::= "[" identifier { identifier } "]"` requires at least one identifier). Both brackets are present and matched, so the `]` is a bad token where a field name was required — not an ol-unmatched-bracket — mirroring how an empty group `( )` reports its matched `)`. Parse-only negative fixture.
